data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding the scenario behavior.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of a scenario where the group size changes after booking. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations related to this scenario, nor does it demonstrate how the system handles changes in group size post-booking. As a result, the validation is inconclusive, and there is no clear actionable failure report or confirmation of support for the scenario behavior.
gaps: No evidence of how the system handles changes in group size after booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for group size change handling
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define explicit checks to verify how the system responds to changes in group size after a booking.
